rationale: For an experimental network analysis system handling massive concurrency, the UI must feel like a high-end command center. Avoiding generic SaaS dashboards, we use a 'Control Room' dense grid, void black backgrounds, and Electric Cyan accents (avoiding forbidden teal #1B93A4) for extreme data clarity and a technical aesthetic.

headings.usage: H1/H2 for panel titles and primary metrics

body.usage: Data tables, paragraphs, and chart labels

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data and labels. Top-right for secondary panel actions.

surface_strategy.shadows: None. Flat surfaces with sharp 1px borders.
surface_strategy.glow: Subtle text-shadow or drop-shadow on active metric numbers (e.g., drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)])
surface_strategy.glassmorphism: Not recommended. Use solid dark backgrounds to prevent visual refraction of dense data.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none hover:bg-[#66FAFF] transition-colors border border-[#00E5FF]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#00E5FF] border border-[#00E5FF]/50 rounded-none hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10
buttons.destructive: bg-transparent text-[#EF4444] border border-[#EF4444]/50 rounded-none hover:bg-[#EF4444]/10

cards.structure: Raw div or heavily stripped Shadcn Card. bg-[#0D0D12] border border-cyan-500/20 rounded-none p-6

charts.lines: 1.5px to 2px solid strokes. No generic gradient fills. Use '#00E5FF' for primary metric, '#EAB308' for secondary.
charts.tooltip: Black background, sharp cyan border, monospace text.

tables.header: Uppercase monospace, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs, text-zinc-400, border-b border-cyan-500/20 pb-2
tables.rows: text-sm IBM Plex Sans, border-b border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

form_controls.toggles: Square or very slightly rounded edges, bright cyan when active.

animations.data_update: Framer motion pulse or background flash on new TCP connection in table.

icons.style: Regular or Duotone weight, highly legible for dense dashboards.

media.notes: CRITICAL: Do NOT use any placeholder images (e.g., via.placeholder.com). This is a purely technical UI driven by data, lines, and charts. If an icon is needed, use Phosphor icons. No actual images are required for this app.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure cyan/yellow pass APCA against #050505.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` in kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid="start-scenario-button"`, `data-testid="export-csv-button"`)

dashboard_layout.header: Sticky top bar, z-50, border-b border-cyan-500/20 bg-[#050505]. Contains Logo/Brand and global status indicator.
dashboard_layout.metrics_row: Top row: 4-5 dense metric cards (Active Conn, Total Conn, Msg/Sec, Conn Rate, Avg Duration). Large IBM Plex Mono numbers.
dashboard_layout.control_panel: Sidebar or top-left panel. Dense sliders and toggles for Client Load Gen (1-100 clients, rates, burst, etc.) and 'Run All Scenarios' (5, 20, 50, 100).
dashboard_layout.main_charts: Center area. Large Recharts visualizing active connections and messages/sec over time.
dashboard_layout.data_tables: Bottom area or tabs. Active Connections history and Scenario Comparison Table.
dashboard_layout.port_analysis: Dedicated section/widget for tracking unique source ports, showing distribution and most frequent ports via Recharts bar chart or dense list.
dashboard_layout.automatic_analysis: A 'Terminal' styled block on the right/bottom: `bg-black border-l-2 border-[#00E5FF] p-4 font-mono text-sm text-zinc-300` displaying dynamic text insights.
